# 8.3 Bill Prompt Assembler

Bill-specific `ChainAssembler` (Component 1 ¬ß1.7) implementation that serializes structured bill data into prompt-friendly text and injects it into Context stage blocks at runtime. Main entry point for bill-analysis-pipeline (Component 10).

## Classes

### `BillPromptAssembler[F[_]]` ‚Äî Trait + Impl

```
trait BillPromptAssembler[F[_]] {
  def assembleForAnalysis(
    profileName: String,
    context: BillAnalysisContext,
    version: Option[String] = None     // None ‚Üí use config default
  ): F[String]

  def assembleForDecomposition(
    profileName: String,
    context: DecompositionContext,
    version: Option[String] = None
  ): F[String]
}
```

Flow: Resolve version ‚Üí Load profile ‚Üí Load blocks ‚Üí Serialize structured context via `BillContextInjector` ‚Üí Delegate to `ChainAssembler.assemble(profile, blocks, contextMap)` ‚Üí Return assembled prompt string.

**`assembleForAnalysis`** ‚Äî Primary method for Pass 1/2/3; takes `BillAnalysisContext` containing all structured data; assembler serializes and injects only values referenced by profile's context blocks.

**`assembleForDecomposition`** ‚Äî Used during decomposition; takes simpler `DecompositionContext` (single concept group or section, no prior pass results).

## Structured Context Types

### `BillAnalysisContext`

```
final case class BillAnalysisContext(
  billId: String,
  congress: Int,
  concepts: List[ConceptGroup],
  amendments: List[AmendmentSummary],
  relatedBills: List[RelatedBillSummary],
  pass1Results: Option[Pass1Output],         // for Pass 2/3
  pass2Results: Option[Pass2Output]          // for Pass 3
)
```

Runtime context for analysis pass prompts. Multi-dimensional (dozens of concepts, many amendments, several related bills). Prior pass results are structured outputs (not raw strings) per concept group.

### `ConceptGroup`

```
final case class ConceptGroup(
  groupId: String,                           // e.g., "transportation-funding"
  title: String,
  topics: List[String],
  sectionReferences: List[String],           // bill sections in this group
  simplifiedText: String                     // LLM-produced summary
)
```

Cluster of related bill sections simplified by decomposition step. Large bills: 10-30 groups. Short bills: 1-3.

### `AmendmentSummary`

```
final case class AmendmentSummary(
  amendmentId: String,
  amendmentType: String,                     // "HAMDT", "SAMDT", "SUAMDT"
  sponsorName: Option[String],
  sponsorBioguideId: Option[String],
  description: String,
  purpose: Option[String],                   // e.g., "In the nature of a substitute"
  latestActionText: Option[String],
  affectedConcepts: List[String]             // groupIds this amendment touches
)
```

**`affectedConcepts`** ‚Äî Best-effort mapping linking amendments to concept groups. Included when present; empty if linkage unclear.

### `RelatedBillSummary`

```
final case class RelatedBillSummary(
  billId: String,
  title: String,
  relationship: String,                      // e.g., "companion bill", "amended by"
  summary: Option[String],                   // Pass 1 summary if available
  topics: List[String]
)
```

Related bill context for Pass 3 cross-bill analysis or amendment references.

### `Pass1Output`

```
final case class Pass1Output(
  conceptSummaries: List[ConceptSummaryResult],
  overallSummary: BillSummaryOutput,         // Component 1 ¬ß1.6
  topics: TopicClassificationOutput          // Component 1 ¬ß1.6
)

final case class ConceptSummaryResult(
  groupId: String,                           // matches ConceptGroup.groupId
  summary: BillSummaryOutput,                // per-concept summary
  topics: TopicClassificationOutput          // per-concept topics
)
```

Per-concept results because large bills (20+ groups) cannot be meaningfully summarized in single pass. Each concept group produces its own summary and classification; then aggregate into overall summary.

### `Pass2Output`

```
final case class Pass2Output(
  pork: PorkDetectionOutput,                 // Component 1 ¬ß1.6
  impacts: ImpactAnalysisOutput,             // Component 1 ¬ß1.6
  stances: StanceClassificationOutput,       // Component 1 ¬ß1.6
  fiscal: FiscalEstimateOutput,              // Component 1 ¬ß1.6
  perConceptAnalysis: List[ConceptAnalysisResult]
)

final case class ConceptAnalysisResult(
  groupId: String,                           // matches ConceptGroup.groupId
  pork: PorkDetectionOutput,                 // per-concept findings
  impacts: ImpactAnalysisOutput,
  stances: StanceClassificationOutput
)
```

Top-level fields are bill-wide aggregates. `perConceptAnalysis` carries per-concept breakdowns that produced them. Pass 3 references specific concept-level findings.

### `DecompositionContext`

```
final case class DecompositionContext(
  billId: String,
  congress: Int,
  conceptGroupText: Option[String] = None,   // for concept-simplification profile
  sectionText: Option[String] = None,        // for section-classification profile
  sectionId: Option[String] = None           // which section being classified
)
```

Simpler than `BillAnalysisContext`. Operates on single section or concept group at a time.

## Vectorization ‚Äî Embedding Generation

Multiple text fields across context and output types are vectorized (pgvector embeddings) for semantic search. Embedding generation is **not** Component 8's responsibility ‚Äî Component 10 generates embeddings after each analysis pass and stores in AlloyDB.

### Fields That Produce Embeddings

**Bill text layer** (decomposition artifacts ‚Äî tied to text version):

| Source Type | Text Field | Storage Table / Column | DO | Purpose |
|------------|-----------|----------------------|-----|---------|
| Section text | `BillTextSectionDO.content` | `bill_text_sections.embedding` | `BillTextSectionDO` (¬ß1.4) | Per-section semantic search |
| `ConceptGroup` | `simplifiedText` | `bill_concept_groups.embedding` | `BillConceptGroupDO` (¬ß1.9) | Concept group semantic search |

**Analysis layer** (LLM analysis results ‚Äî tied to analysis run):

| Source Type | Text Field | Storage Table / Column | DO | Purpose |
|------------|-----------|----------------------|-----|---------|
| `BillSummaryOutput` (overall) | `summary` | `bill_analyses.embedding` | `BillAnalysisDO` (¬ß1.9) | Bill-level similarity search |
| `BillSummaryOutput` (per-concept) | `summary` | `bill_concept_summaries.embedding` | `BillConceptSummaryDO` (¬ß1.9) | Per-concept analysis search |
| `PorkFinding` | `description` | `bill_findings.embedding` | `BillFindingDO` (¬ß1.9) | Pork/rider pattern search |
| `ImpactItem` | `description` | `bill_findings.embedding` | `BillFindingDO` (¬ß1.9) | Impact pattern search |
| `AmendmentSummary` | `description` | `amendment_findings.embedding` | `AmendmentFindingDO` (¬ß1.9) | Amendment search |
| `TopicClassificationOutput` | `topics[].topic` | `bill_subjects.embedding` | `BillSubjectDO` (¬ß1.2) | Topic similarity |

### Embedding Rules

- **Model**: Determined by Component 10 config (e.g., OpenAI `text-embedding-3-small` at 1536 dimensions)
- **Generated**: After each analysis pass completes by Component 10
- **Storage**: AlloyDB in two layers ‚Äî bill text layer (`BillTextSectionDO.embedding`, `BillConceptGroupDO.embedding`) and analysis layer (`BillAnalysisDO.embedding`, `BillConceptSummaryDO.embedding`, `BillFindingDO.embedding`, `AmendmentFindingDO.embedding`)
- **HNSW indexes**: Defined in schema (001 + 002 migrations) for cosine-distance search
- **Component 8 role**: Assembles prompts only. Does not generate embeddings. Component 10 handles embedding generation.

## Context Serialization

### `BillContextInjector` ‚Äî Object

Serializes structured context types into prompt-friendly text and injects into Context stage blocks. Formats lists of structured objects into readable prompt sections.

```
object BillContextInjector {
  def serialize(context: BillAnalysisContext): Map[String, String]
  def serialize(context: DecompositionContext): Map[String, String]

  def inject(
    blocks: Map[String, InstructionBlock],
    contextMap: Map[String, String]
  ): Either[String, Map[String, InstructionBlock]]
}
```

**`serialize(BillAnalysisContext)`** produces placeholder ‚Üí formatted text map:

| Placeholder | Serialization |
|-------------|--------------|
| `{{bill_concepts}}` | Each `ConceptGroup` as titled section (title, topics, section refs, text); groups separated by dividers. |
| `{{amendments}}` | Each `AmendmentSummary` with ID, type, sponsor, description, purpose, status, affected concepts; numbered list. |
| `{{related_bills}}` | Each `RelatedBillSummary` with ID, title, relationship, summary, topic overlap; numbered list. |
| `{{pass1_results}}` | `Pass1Output` as structured text: overall summary then per-concept summaries with topics; titled sections matching concept style. |
| `{{pass2_results}}` | `Pass2Output` as structured text: aggregate findings (pork, impacts, stances, fiscal) then per-concept breakdowns; numbered lists with severity. |

Empty lists serialize to "None" indicator (e.g., "No amendments associated with this bill.") so LLM knows absence is intentional.

**`serialize(DecompositionContext)`** produces:

| Placeholder | Serialization |
|-------------|--------------|
| `{{concept_group_text}}` | Raw section text from `conceptGroupText` |
| `{{section_text}}` | Raw section text from `sectionText` |

**`inject`** behavior:
1. For each block where `stage == Context`: scan `block.content` for `{{placeholder}}` tokens; replace with serialized values from `contextMap`.
2. Non-Context blocks passed through unchanged.
3. Return `Left` if placeholder has no matching key in `contextMap` AND block is referenced by active profile.

### Serialization Format

Structured, readable text (not JSON). Markdown-style with section headers, topic tags, dividers:

```
## Concept 1: Transportation Funding
Topics: infrastructure, federal-highways, public-transit
Sections: ¬ß101, ¬ß102, ¬ß105, ¬ß201
Summary: Authorizes $550 billion in new federal spending for highways,
bridges, and public transit systems over five years...

---

## Concept 2: Broadband Infrastructure
Topics: telecommunications, rural-access, digital-divide
Sections: ¬ß301, ¬ß302, ¬ß303
Summary: Allocates $65 billion to expand broadband internet access,
with priority for underserved rural and tribal communities...
```

Format optimized for LLM parsing. Not hardcoded ‚Äî determined by `ContextFormatter` strategy (swappable).

### `ContextFormatter` ‚Äî Trait

```
trait ContextFormatter {
  def formatConcepts(concepts: List[ConceptGroup]): String
  def formatAmendments(amendments: List[AmendmentSummary]): String
  def formatRelatedBills(bills: List[RelatedBillSummary]): String
  def formatPass1Results(results: Pass1Output): String
  def formatPass2Results(results: Pass2Output): String
}
```

Default: markdown-style formatting. Swappable for testing or if different format yields better LLM results.

Pass result formatting: per-concept results as titled sections (matching concept format), aggregate results in "Overall" section:

```
## Pass 1 Results ‚Äî Overall
Summary: [overall BillSummaryOutput.summary]
Key Points: [overall keyPoints]
Topics: [overall topics with scores]

---

## Pass 1 ‚Äî Concept: Transportation Funding
Summary: [per-concept summary]
Topics: infrastructure (0.95), federal-highways (0.88)

---

## Pass 1 ‚Äî Concept: Broadband Infrastructure
Summary: [per-concept summary]
Topics: telecommunications (0.91), rural-access (0.85)
```

## Key Design Decisions

- **Structured context, not strings** ‚Äî `BillAnalysisContext` carries typed lists of concepts, amendments, related bills. Allows optimal LLM formatting and independent serialization testing.
- **`ContextFormatter` swappable** ‚Äî Different LLMs respond better to different formats. Formatter is trait (not hardcoded).
- **Empty lists produce explicit "None" text** ‚Äî LLM distinguishes "no amendments exist" from "amendments not loaded."
- **Prior pass results structured, not strings** ‚Äî `Pass1Output` and `Pass2Output` carry per-concept breakdowns plus bill-wide aggregates. Serialized into readable text via `ContextFormatter` (not raw JSON).
- **Vectorization downstream** ‚Äî Text fields produce embeddings for semantic search. Component 8 does not generate embeddings. Component 10 handles generation after analysis passes.
- **`affectedConcepts` best-effort** ‚Äî Not all amendments linkable to specific groups. Assembler includes linkage when present; does not fail if absent.
- **No LLM calls** ‚Äî Assembler produces string only.
- **No bill data fetching** ‚Äî Receives pre-fetched context. Component 10 fetches and passes in.
- **Version override per request** ‚Äî Pipeline can test new prompt version for specific bill without changing default.

## Error Types

```
final case class ContextInjectionFailed(
  profileName: String,
  missingPlaceholders: List[String]
) extends Exception(
  s"Context injection failed for profile '$profileName': missing values for placeholders: ${missingPlaceholders.mkString(", ")}"
)
```

## Acceptance Criteria

| Criterion | Test |
|-----------|------|
| `assembleForAnalysis` loads profile and blocks, injects context, returns assembled prompt | Mock loader ‚Üí 3 concepts ‚Üí assembled string contains all concept titles |
| `assembleForAnalysis` uses config default version when `version = None` | No override ‚Üí `ProfileLoader` called with `config.defaultVersion` |
| `assembleForAnalysis` uses override version when provided | `version = Some("2.0.0")` ‚Üí `ProfileLoader` called with `"2.0.0"` |
| `assembleForDecomposition` works with `concept-simplification` profile | `DecompositionContext(conceptGroupText = Some(...))` ‚Üí prompt contains concept text |
| `assembleForDecomposition` works with `section-classification` profile | `DecompositionContext(sectionText = Some(...))` ‚Üí prompt contains section text |
| Concepts serialized with titles, topics, section refs, summaries | 3 `ConceptGroup` ‚Üí 3 titled sections with dividers |
| Concept ordering preserved | [A, B, C] ‚Üí appear in that order |
| Amendments serialized as numbered list with all fields | 5 amendments ‚Üí 5 numbered entries with sponsor, description, purpose |
| Amendments with `affectedConcepts` include cross-references | Amendment with `affectedConcepts = ["transportation-funding"]` ‚Üí text mentions concept |
| Amendments with empty `affectedConcepts` still serialized | No linkage ‚Üí serialized without concept references |
| Related bills serialized with relationship and topic overlap | 2 bills ‚Üí 2 entries with relationship and topics |
| Empty concept list produces "None" text | `concepts = List()` ‚Üí "No concepts extracted" or similar |
| Empty amendment list produces "None" text | `amendments = List()` ‚Üí "No amendments associated with this bill." |
| Empty related bills list produces "None" text | `relatedBills = List()` ‚Üí "No related bills identified." |
| Pass 1 results serialized with per-concept summaries and topics | `pass1Results = Some(Pass1Output(...))` ‚Üí per-concept summaries and classifications |
| Pass 1 results include overall summary distinct from per-concept | 3 concept results + overall ‚Üí overall separate from per-concept sections |
| Pass 2 results serialized with aggregate and per-concept findings | `pass2Results = Some(Pass2Output(...))` ‚Üí aggregate pork/impact/stance/fiscal plus per-concept analysis |
| Pass 2 per-concept findings reference groupIds | `ConceptAnalysisResult(groupId = "transportation")` ‚Üí text labels findings with concept group |
| Pass 1 prompt contains concepts and amendments, not pass results | Assemble `pass1-extraction` ‚Üí concepts present, no `{{pass1_results}}` |
| Pass 2 prompt contains concepts, amendments, Pass 1 results | Assemble `pass2-deep-analysis` ‚Üí concepts, amendments, per-concept Pass 1 summaries present |
| Pass 3 prompt contains all context (concepts, amendments, related bills, both passes) | Assemble `pass3-ambiguity-resolution` ‚Üí all present |
| Assembled prompt stages in correct order | Any profile ‚Üí System before Persona before Lens before Context before Guardrails before Output |
| Weight translation applied | `weight: 1.0` ‚Üí "You MUST" emphasis |
| Weight translation for low-weight blocks | `weight: 0.3` ‚Üí advisory framing |
| `ContextFormatter` swappable | Custom formatter ‚Üí serialized output uses custom format |
| Profile load failure propagates as `ProfileLoadFailed` | Mock throws ‚Üí `ProfileLoadFailed` raised |
| Block load failure propagates as `BlockLoadFailed` | Mock throws ‚Üí `BlockLoadFailed` raised |
| Context injection failure propagates as `ContextInjectionFailed` | Unresolvable placeholder ‚Üí `ContextInjectionFailed` with name |
| Single-concept bill works | `concepts = List(single)` ‚Üí single section, no dividers |
| 20+ concepts serialize all | 20 concepts ‚Üí all 20 in output |
| Amendment with all Optional fields as None | `sponsorName = None, purpose = None` ‚Üí serialized with available fields |
| `Pass1Output` with single concept | 1 result ‚Üí clean serialization, no per/overall confusion |
| `Pass2Output` with empty `perConceptAnalysis` | Still serializes aggregates |
| `ConceptSummaryResult` groupIds consistent with `ConceptGroup.groupId` | References match |
| `ContextFormatter` handles `Pass1Output` serialization | Custom formatter ‚Üí Pass 1 uses custom format |
| `ContextFormatter` handles `Pass2Output` serialization | Custom formatter ‚Üí Pass 2 uses custom format |
